title: Pyrex Cook & Heat Rectangular Dish with Lid - 280x200mm 2.6Ltr
description: From the manufacturer Pyrex Borosilicate Glass Dishes Borosilicate glass is known to have a thermal resistance, higher than that of any other glass. Its quality provides light weight and durability. Pyrex borosilicate glass withstands extreme temperatures from -40 °C to 300 °C and is resistant to thermal shock of 220 °C. Thermal shock is a sudden change in temperature that can cause bursting. Since 2017, Pyrex borosilicate glass ranges have been labelled Origin France. Why a glass storage dish? Glass is a natural material and does not contain bisphenol A, phthalates and other harmful toxins. So there is no risk of migration of harmful elements to food. Glass is not a porous material, which ensures hygienic cooking, use after use. The glass has the advantage that it does not retain stains or odours, you can cut directly into the dish without the risk of scratches. Natural material No transfer of harmful particles into food Hygienic material Does not retain stains or odours Will not scratch Different models in ambience Rectangular storage dish Available in 3 sizes 1-2 people: 17 x 10 x 2 cm² for 3 people: 23 x 15 x 6cm3 to 4 people: 28 x 20 x 8 cm Round shaped storage dish Available in 3 sizes Single: 14 x 12 x 4 cm1 to 2 people: 20 x 17 x 6cm3 to 4 people: 25 x 22 x 7 cm Square shaped storage dish Available in 3 sizes Single: 14 x 12 x 5 cm1 to 2 people: 20 x 18 x 7cm3 to 4 people: 26 x 23 8 cm Discover all the features of the Cook & Heat range Warm up Thanks to the patented valve lid, you can easily heat your dishes in the microwave. No more splashing in the microwave! Store The Cook&Heat range allows you to keep your dishes fresh thanks to the airtight lid and sliding clips for a secure closure. Stacking The lid is designed to save space in your fridge thanks to the stackability of the dishes. Dishwasher safe All glass dishes and lids are dishwasher safe. To avoid deformation, place the lids on the hottest part of your dishwasher.
